mapper.select: select a.answer_id, a.survey_id, s.title as survey_title, a.participant_key, a.submit_ip, a.user_agent, a.answer_json, a.submit_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from sys_survey_answer a left join sys_survey s on s.survey_id = a.survey_id where a.survey_id = #{surveyId} and a.participant_key = #{participantKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_survey_answer ( survey_id, participant_key, submit_ip, user_agent, answer_json, submit_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{surveyId}, #{participantKey}, #{submitIp}, #{userAgent}, #{answerJson}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )

insert into sys_survey_answer_item ( answer_id, survey_id, question_key, question_label, question_type, answer_text, option_value, score, sort_no, submit_time ) values
( #{item.answerId}, #{item.surveyId}, #{item.questionKey}, #{item.questionLabel}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.answerText}, #{item.optionValue}, #{item.score}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.submitTime} )
mapper.select:
select a.answer_id, a.survey_id, s.title as survey_title, a.participant_key, a.submit_ip, a.user_agent, a.answer_json, a.submit_time, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from sys_survey_answer a left join sys_survey s on s.survey_id = a.survey_id
and a.survey_id = #{surveyId}
and a.participant_key like concat('%', #{participantKey}, '%')
and date_format(a.submit_time, '%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime}, '%Y%m%d')
and date_format(a.submit_time, '%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime}, '%Y%m%d')
order by a.answer_id desc

select a.survey_id, a.answer_id, a.participant_key, i.question_key, i.question_label, i.question_type, i.answer_text, i.option_value, a.submit_time from sys_survey_answer a inner join sys_survey_answer_item i on i.answer_id = a.answer_id
and a.survey_id = #{surveyId}
and a.participant_key like concat('%', #{participantKey}, '%')
and date_format(a.submit_time, '%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime}, '%Y%m%d')
and date_format(a.submit_time, '%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime}, '%Y%m%d')
order by a.answer_id desc, i.item_id asc
